title: Ti ho sposato per allegria
writer: Sandro Continenza, Natalia Ginzburg, Luciano Salce
actors: Monica Vitti, Giorgio Albertazzi, Maria Grazia Buccella
plot: Pietro is a bourgeois young lawyer who married Giuliana, a pretty but slightly unbalanced girl he met at a party full of artists. Despite the premises, everything between the two seems to work best.
